Title: Accesso alla schermata impostazioni
Preconditions: Essere nella schermata home dell’applicazione
Test Steps: 1. Premere il tasto relativo alle impostazioni da qualsiasi punto dell’applicazione
Expected Result: L’applicazione visualizza la schermata delle impostazioni

Title: Modifica unità di misura senza salvare
Preconditions: Essere nella schermata delle impostazioni
Test Steps:
1. Selezionare un’unità di misura diversa per una categoria (es. Elettricità: kWh → MWh)
2. Premere il tasto per uscire dalla schermata senza confermare
Expected Result: Nessuna modifica viene applicata e le unità di misura rimangono invariate

Title: Modifica unità di misura con effetto immediato
Preconditions: Essere nella schermata delle impostazioni
Test Data: Unità di misura predefinite (es. kWh per Elettricità)
Test Steps:
1. Selezionare un’unità di misura diversa per una categoria (es. Elettricità: kWh → MWh)
2. Confermare la modifica
Expected Result: Le unità di misura vengono aggiornate immediatamente e le modifiche prendono effetto in tutte le schermate dell’applicazione

Title: Cambio tema estetico
Preconditions: Essere nella schermata delle impostazioni
Test Steps:
1. Selezionare un tema diverso (es. Dark)
2. Confermare la modifica
Expected Result: Il tema dell’applicazione viene aggiornato immediatamente

Title: Accesso alla schermata selezione informazioni app
Preconditions: Essere nella schermata home dell’applicazione
Test Steps: 1. Premere il tasto relativo alla schermata di selezione informazioni app
Expected Result: L’applicazione visualizza la lista delle funzionalità offerte dall’app

Title: Visualizzazione funzionalità disponibili
Preconditions: Essere nella schermata di selezione informazioni app
Test Steps:
1. Verificare che le seguenti funzionalità siano elencate:
Stima emissioni energia elettrica
Stima emissioni voli aerei
Stima emissioni consegna merci
Stima emissioni veicoli
Stima emissioni combustione carburante
Expected Result: Tutte le funzionalità elencate sono visibili e selezionabili

Title: Accesso alle informazioni di una funzionalità specifica
Preconditions: Essere nella schermata di selezione informazioni app
Test Steps: 1. Selezionare la funzionalità "Stima emissioni energia elettrica"
Expected Result: L’applicazione visualizza una schermata con le informazioni dettagliate sulla funzionalità, inclusi i campi da compilare

Title: Accesso alla schermata home dall’avvio dell’applicazione
Preconditions: Avere l’applicazione installata nel proprio smartphone
Test Steps: 1. Avviare l’applicazione dal proprio smartphone
Expected Result: Viene visualizzata la schermata home dell’applicazione

Title: Accesso alla schermata home da un’altra schermata
Preconditions: Essere in una schermata diversa dalla home (es. impostazioni)
Test Steps: 1. Premere il tasto per la schermata home
Expected Result: Viene visualizzata la schermata home dell’applicazione

Title: Navigazione alle funzionalità principali dalla home
Preconditions: Essere nella schermata home
Test Steps:
1. Verificare che siano accessibili le seguenti sezioni:
Impostazioni
Schermata di selezione informazioni app
Stima emissioni energia elettrica
Stima emissioni voli aerei
Stima emissioni consegna merci
Stima emissioni veicoli
Stima emissioni combustione carburante
Expected Result: Tutte le sezioni elencate sono raggiungibili e selezionabili

Title: Stima emissioni energia elettrica con dati completi
Preconditions: Essere nella schermata delle stime
Test Data: Consumo elettrico = 500 kWh, Nazione di riferimento = Italia
Test Steps:
1. Selezionare la funzionalità "Stima emissioni energia elettrica"
2. Inserire il consumo elettrico (es. 500 kWh)
3. Selezionare la nazione di riferimento (es. Italia)
4. Confermare l’inserimento
Expected Result: La stima delle emissioni di carbonio viene stampata a schermo correttamente

Title: Stima emissioni energia elettrica con dati mancanti
Preconditions: Essere nella schermata delle stime
Test Steps:
1. Selezionare la funzionalità "Stima emissioni energia elettrica"
2. Premere il tasto per confermare senza inserire dati
Expected Result: Viene segnalato un errore indicando che i dati sono mancanti o errati

Title: Stima emissioni voli aerei con dati completi
Preconditions: Essere nella schermata delle stime
Test Data: Aeroporto di provenienza = Roma, Aeroporto di destinazione = Milano, Numero passeggeri = 2, Classe di cabina = Economy
Test Steps:
1. Selezionare la funzionalità "Stima emissioni voli aerei"
2. Inserire aeroporto di provenienza (es. Roma)
3. Inserire aeroporto di destinazione (es. Milano)
4. Inserire numero passeggeri (es. 2)
5. Selezionare classe di cabina (es. Economy)
6. Confermare l’inserimento
Expected Result: La stima delle emissioni di carbonio viene stampata a schermo correttamente

Title: Stima emissioni voli aerei con dati mancanti
Preconditions: Essere nella schermata delle stime
Test Data: Aeroporto di provenienza = (vuoto), Aeroporto di destinazione = (vuoto), Numero passeggeri = (vuoto), Classe di cabina = (vuoto)
Test Steps:
1. Selezionare la funzionalità "Stima emissioni voli aerei"
2. Premere il tasto per confermare senza inserire dati
Expected Result: Viene segnalato un errore indicando che i dati sono mancanti o errati

Title: Stima emissioni consegna merci con dati completi
Preconditions: Essere nella schermata delle stime
Test Data: Peso = 100 kg, Distanza = 500 km, Mezzo di trasporto = Treno
Test Steps:
1. Selezionare la funzionalità "Stima emissioni consegna merci"
2. Inserire peso (es. 100 kg)
3. Inserire distanza (es. 500 km)
4. Selezionare mezzo di trasporto (es. Treno)
5. Confermare l’inserimento
Expected Result: La stima delle emissioni di carbonio viene stampata a schermo correttamente

Title: Stima emissioni consegna merci con dati mancanti
Preconditions: Essere nella schermata delle stime
Test Steps:
1. Selezionare la funzionalità "Stima emissioni consegna merci"
2. Premere il tasto per confermare senza inserire dati
Expected Result: Viene segnalato un errore indicando che i dati sono mancanti o errati

Title: Stima emissioni veicoli con dati completi
Preconditions: Essere nella schermata delle stime
Test Data: Distanza = 200 km, Marca del veicolo = Toyota, Modello del veicolo = Corolla
Test Steps:
1. Selezionare la funzionalità "Stima emissioni veicoli"
2. Inserire distanza (es. 200 km)
3. Inserire marca del veicolo (es. Toyota)
4. Inserire modello del veicolo (es. Corolla)
5. Confermare l’inserimento
Expected Result: La stima delle emissioni di carbonio viene stampata a schermo correttamente

Title: Change Application Settings
Preconditions: User has launched the application.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the settings section of the application.
2. Select an option to change application settings (e.g., units of measurement).
3. Confirm the change.
Expected Result: The application updates its internal behavior according to the selected settings.

Title: Change Units of Measurement
Preconditions: User is in the settings section.
Test Data: Metric units (e.g., kilometers, kilograms) and Imperial units (e.g., miles, pounds).
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the units of measurement option.
2. Select a different unit system (e.g., switch from metric to Imperial).
3. Return to a section where measurements are displayed (e.g., emissions estimation).
Expected Result: All displayed measurements are updated to reflect the newly selected unit system.

Title: Display Application Features Overview
Preconditions: User has launched the application for the first time.
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Navigate to the section summarizing application features.
Expected Result: The application displays a list of available functionalities to the user.

Title: Display Detailed Information for Selected Estimate
Preconditions: User has selected a specific estimation (e.g., emissions from electricity).
Test Data: A previously selected estimation (e.g., flight emissions).
Test Steps:
1. Select a specific estimation (e.g., flight emissions).
2. Navigate to the section containing detailed information about the selected estimation.
Expected Result: The application displays all relevant details about the selected estimation.

Title: Access Dashboard for Navigation
Preconditions: User has launched the application.
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Navigate to the dashboard.
3. Attempt to access different sections (e.g., emissions estimates, settings).
Expected Result: The dashboard provides easy access to all major sections of the application.

Title: Estimate Emissions from Electricity Consumption
Preconditions: User is in the emissions estimation section.
Test Steps:
1. Select the option for estimating emissions from electricity consumption.
2. Enter the electricity consumption value.
3. Submit the input.
Expected Result: The application displays an estimated emission value for the provided electricity consumption.

Title: Estimate Emissions from Flight Travel
Preconditions: User is in the emissions estimation section.
Test Data: Departure airport (e.g., Rome), arrival airport (e.g., Paris), passenger count (e.g., 1).
Test Steps:
1. Select the option for estimating emissions from flight travel.
2. Enter departure and arrival airports.
3. Enter passenger count.
4. Submit the input.
Expected Result: The application displays an estimated emission value for the provided flight details.

Title: Estimate Emissions from Goods Delivery
Preconditions: User is in the emissions estimation section.
Test Data: Distance (e.g., 100 km), weight of goods (e.g., 5 kg).
Test Steps:
1. Select the option for estimating emissions from goods delivery.
2. Enter the distance and weight of goods.
3. Submit the input.
Expected Result: The application displays an estimated emission value for the provided delivery details.

Title: Estimate Emissions from Vehicle Trip
Preconditions: User is in the emissions estimation section.
Test Data: Trip duration (e.g., 2 hours), vehicle type (e.g., sedan).
Test Steps:
1. Select the option for estimating emissions from a vehicle trip.
2. Enter trip duration and vehicle type.
3. Submit the input.
Expected Result: The application displays an estimated emission value for the provided vehicle trip details.

Title: Estimate Emissions from Fuel Combustion
Preconditions: User is in the emissions estimation section.
Test Steps:
1. Select the option for estimating emissions from fuel combustion.
2. Enter fuel type and quantity.
3. Submit the input.
Expected Result: The application displays an estimated emission value for the provided fuel details.

Title: Verify Proper Resource Deallocation on Uninstall
Preconditions: Application is installed on the device.
Test Steps: 1. Uninstall the application from the device.
Expected Result: The application deallocates all occupied storage space without leaving residual files.

Title: Verify API Response Time Constraint
Preconditions: Application is connected to external APIs.
Test Steps:
1. Trigger an API call (e.g., fetching emission data).
2. Measure the response time.
Expected Result: The application responds within 5 seconds for all API communications.

Title: Verify Flutter Framework Implementation
Preconditions: None
Test Steps:
1. Install the application on an Android device.
2. Install the same application on an iOS device.
3. Execute a basic function (e.g., open the main screen) on both devices.
Expected Result: The application runs without errors on both Android and iOS devices.

Title: Verify Minimal Native Feature Usage
Preconditions: None
Test Steps:
1. Review the application’s codebase for native device feature calls.
2. Identify any usage of hardware-specific features (e.g., camera, GPS, Bluetooth).
Expected Result: The application uses only essential native features (e.g., basic permissions like storage or network access) and avoids uncommon hardware features.

Title: Verify Local Operation Speed
Preconditions: Device connected to a stable network (for non-local operations)
Test Steps:
1. Navigate from the main screen to any other screen (e.g., settings).
2. Measure the time taken for the screen transition.
3. Perform a local interaction (e.g., toggle a setting in settings screen).
4. Measure the time taken for the interaction to complete.
Expected Result: Both screen transition and local interaction complete within 1 second.

Title: Verify Storage Footprint
Preconditions: Application installed on a test device
Test Steps:
1. Install the application on a device.
2. Check the storage space occupied by the application in device settings.
Expected Result: The application occupies less than 50MB of storage.

Title: Verify Navigation Hierarchy
Preconditions: Application installed and opened
Test Steps:
1. Navigate through the application starting from the main screen.
2. Count the maximum levels of navigation required to reach any screen.
3. Verify horizontal navigation options (e.g., tabs, side menus) are available.
Expected Result: The application has a maximum of two navigation levels and supports easy horizontal navigation.

Title: Verify Material Design Compliance
Preconditions: Application installed and opened
Test Steps:
1. Inspect the UI elements (buttons, icons, layouts) across all screens.
2. Compare UI elements with Flutter’s Material Design guidelines.
Expected Result: The application uses standard Flutter icons and adheres to Material Design layout principles.

Title: Verify Clean Code Principles
Preconditions: Access to the application’s source code
Test Steps:
1. Review a sample of the codebase (e.g., a function, class, or module).
2. Check for adherence to clean code principles (e.g., meaningful names, small functions, comments).
Expected Result: The codebase follows clean code principles, ensuring readability and ease of modification.

Title: Verify Internet Connectivity Requirement
Preconditions: None
Test Steps: 1. Attempt to use a feature requiring the "carboninterface" API (e.g., carbon emission estimate) without internet.
Expected Result: The application either prompts the user to connect to the internet or disables the feature gracefully.

Title: Verify Settings Configuration Persistence
Preconditions: Application installed and opened
Test Steps:
1. Open the settings screen by clicking the gear icon.
2. Modify a setting (e.g., unit of measurement).
3. Close the application and reopen it.
4. Verify the modified setting is retained.
Expected Result: The changed setting is saved and persists after reopening the application.

Title: Verify Unit of Measurement Configuration
Preconditions: Application installed and opened; settings screen accessible
Test Steps:
1. Open the settings screen.
2. Navigate to the unit of measurement section.
3. Change the unit of measurement (e.g., from metric to imperial).
4. Navigate back to the main screen and verify the change.
Expected Result: The unit of measurement is updated across all relevant screens and saved with other settings.

Title: Verify selection of estimation functionality from dashboard
Preconditions: User is on the main screen with available functionalities
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the dashboard screen displaying available estimation functionalities.
2. User selects "stima emissioni energia elettrica" (electricity emission estimation).
Expected Result: The system displays the screen for entering electricity consumption details (RF-03).

Title: Verify display of available estimation functionalities
Preconditions: User is on the main screen
Test Steps: 1. User opens the application and reaches the dashboard screen.
Expected Result: The system displays a collection of available estimation functionalities (RF-04).

Title: Verify carbon emission estimation for electricity consumption
Preconditions: User has selected "stima emissioni energia elettrica" from the dashboard
Test Steps:
1. User enters a valid electricity consumption value.
2. User confirms the input.
Expected Result: The system displays the estimated carbon emissions based on the entered value and selected units (RF-05).

Title: Verify carbon emission estimation for flight details
Preconditions: User has selected "stima emissioni voli aerei" from the dashboard
Test Data: Valid flight details (e.g., distance, passenger count)
Test Steps:
1. User enters valid flight details (e.g., distance traveled, number of passengers).
2. User confirms the input.
Expected Result: The system displays the estimated carbon emissions based on the entered flight details and selected units (RF-06).

Title: Verify carbon emission estimation for goods delivery
Preconditions: User has selected "stima emissioni consegna merci" from the dashboard
Test Data: Valid delivery details (e.g., distance, weight of goods)
Test Steps:
1. User enters valid delivery details (e.g., distance traveled, weight of goods).
2. User confirms the input.
Expected Result: The system displays the estimated carbon emissions based on the entered delivery details and selected units (RF-07).

Title: Verify carbon emission estimation for vehicle trips
Preconditions: User has selected "stima emissioni veicoli" from the dashboard
Test Data: Valid trip details (e.g., distance, vehicle type, fuel efficiency)
Test Steps:
1. User enters valid trip details (e.g., distance traveled, vehicle type, fuel efficiency).
2. User confirms the input.
Expected Result: The system displays the estimated carbon emissions based on the entered trip details and selected units (RF-08).

Title: Verify carbon emission estimation for fuel combustion
Preconditions: User has selected "stima emissioni combustione carburante" from the dashboard
Test Steps:
1. User enters a valid quantity of fuel used.
2. User confirms the input.
Expected Result: The system displays the estimated carbon emissions based on the entered fuel quantity and selected units (RF-09).
